title: ericameria parryi var. vulcanica
intro: Ericameria parryi var. vulcanica, also known as the volcanic goldenrod, is a variety of the Ericameria parryi plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Ericameria parryi var. vulcanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and combat infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Ericameria parryi var. vulcanica can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
